name: Label
purpose: Provides a consistent, readable form label contract that works across text inputs, switches, and future field controls.
whenToUse: Use for visible field labels and other short control descriptors.
Use the required indicator instead of inventing custom form label patterns.
whenNotToUse: Do not use Label as a page heading or paragraph wrapper.
Do not hide the label when the field still needs an accessible description.
accessibilityRequirements: Keep labels visible for most form controls so the screen reads clearly for sighted and assistive-technology users.
If a visible label cannot be shown, ensure the target control exposes an equivalent accessibility label.
